items.headline: MiSTer Companion v3.0.0 RC4 Available
items.message:
MiSTer Companion v3.0.0 RC4 is now available.

This release introduces initial balena CLI support for Flash Mr. Fusion on macOS, implemented by DoggyChicken.

macOS file access has also been improved by combining SMB with SFTP, providing a more reliable solution where SMB alone could be unstable. This improvement was also contributed by DoggyChicken.

PCN Premium Member Wallpapers have been added to the Wallpapers tab and are now also available through the update_all configuration.

You can download the latest release candidate below.

items.headline: Help Bring MiSTer Companion to macOS
items.message:
macOS support is now being actively worked on, with recent improvements contributed by DoggyChicken.

To continue improving and properly maintain macOS support long-term, having access to a Mac for development and testing is still essential. At the moment, I rely on community contributions and am unable to test macOS-specific changes directly.

If you'd like to help make this possible, consider supporting the Ko-fi goal below.
